title: Edifecs Appoints Former McKesson Leader, Stephen Ayers, as Chief Financial Officer
text: BELLEVUE, Wash.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Edifecs, Inc., a global health information technology solutions company, announced today the addition of Stephen Ayers to its leadership team as chief financial officer (CFO).
